name: Apricot-Oatmeal Bars/LF
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Lightly oil an 8 by 12-inch baking dish or coat it with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together oats, flour, brown sugar, salt and baking soda until no lumps remain.
Drizzle oil and fruit juice over the mixture and combine with your fingertips until evenly moistened and crumbly.
Set aside 1/2 cup for the topping. Press the remaining mixture evenly into the prepared baking dish.
Spread apricot preserves over the top. Sprinkle with the reserved oat topping.
Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden. Let cool in the baking dish on a rack. Cut into 15 bars. Store at room temperature in an airtight container. Makes 15 bars.
